name: Google Forms MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Google Forms enabling AI agents to create and manage Google Forms to run surveys and collect data. Supports adding text and multiple choice questions, managing form structure, and accessing form responses — automating form creation and data collection workflows.
use_cases: Creating surveys and feedback forms programmatically from AI workflow agents
Building onboarding forms and data collection workflows from automation agents
Generating research questionnaires from AI-driven research agents
Managing form responses and extracting data for analysis agents
not_for: Teams using Typeform, SurveyMonkey, or other form platforms
Complex form logic requiring advanced branching (basic Google Forms features)
Anonymous surveys requiring guaranteed anonymity (Google Forms ties to Google accounts)
best_when: A team using Google Workspace wants AI agents to create and manage Google Forms for surveys and data collection — automating form creation from natural language descriptions.
avoid_when: You use Typeform, Airtable Forms, or other survey tools. Also: Google Forms has limited advanced logic compared to dedicated survey platforms.

auth.notes: Google OAuth 2.0 with Google Forms API scopes. Use minimal scopes — forms.body for form management, forms.responses.readonly for reading responses.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Google Forms API is free with Google account; rate limits apply
pricing.paid_tiers: None for basic usage; Google Workspace for enterprise features
pricing.notes: Google Forms is free. Google Cloud project required for API credentials. Community MCP implementation.

performance.rate_limits: Google Forms API rate limits apply; typically adequate for form management

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Form responses may contain sensitive personal data — handle respondent data carefully
Google OAuth consent screen requires verification for production use beyond test users
Google Forms API has limited advanced form logic compared to dedicated survey platforms
Form response data tied to Google accounts — consider anonymization requirements
Community MCP implementation — test thoroughly before production use
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Survey responses can contain sensitive personal data. Use minimal OAuth scopes. Handle respondent data per GDPR/privacy requirements.

security_score_components.security_notes: Survey response privacy. Google OAuth. Handle personal data per privacy regulations.
